title: Xiao Tie Zhu
synopsis: On a hill with beautiful scenery, there lived some small animals and their good friend Xiao Tie Zhu. One day, a young sparrow was attacked and injured by an eagle. The bird was found by a bear and a rabbit who try to help it out. But more dangers lie ahead...

title: Sand Land: The Series
synopsis: In the far future, war has destroyed the entire Earth, leaving only a barren wasteland where the supply of water is controlled by the greedy king. In search of a long-lost lake, Sheriff Rao asked the king of the demons for help...and got the king's son, Beelzebub, and his assistant, Thief. Together the unlikely trio sets off across the desert, facing dragons, bandits and the deadliest foe of all... the King's army itself! The first half of the SAND LAND: THE SERIES anime, episodes one to six, are titled “Akuma no Ooji” and is based on the film adaptation with some new footage, it will premiere alongside episode seven, which is the first episode of a brand-new arc titled “Tenshi no Yuusha”. (Source: VIZ Media, Crunchyroll News, edited)

title: Nintama Rantarou: Dokutake Ninja-tai Saikyоu no Gunshi
titleRomaji: Nintama Rantarou: Dokutake Ninja-tai Saikyоu no Gunshi
titleNative: 劇場版 忍たま乱太郎 ドクタケ忍者隊最強の軍師
synonyms: Nintama Rantaro: Invincible Master of the Dokutake Ninja
synopsis: Rantaro, Kirimaru, and Shinbei are far from being excellent ninjas. Training at an elite ninjutsu academy in historical Japan, they are accompanied by their tongue-in-cheek friends, ninja masters, and idol senior ninja trainees. Rantaro and his ninja-in-training pals are called "nintama" — a combination of "ninja" and "tamago" ("egg"). The story of the film begins when Doi-sensei disappears after being challenged to a duel by Moroizumi Sonnamon, a tasogaredoki ninja. While Yamada-sensei and the 6th graders of the Ninjutsu Academy search for Doi-sensei, a man dressed in white suddenly appears at the Academy! (Source: Japanese Canadian Cultural Centre)

title: Journey Crisis! The St. Freya Special Event
titleRomaji: Lutu Weiji! Sheng Freya Hao Tebie Shijian
titleEnglish: Journey Crisis! The St. Freya Special Event
titleNative: 旅途危机！圣芙蕾雅号特别事件
synopsis: This is the much-anticipated perfect vacation for everyone. On the luxurious spaceship, St. Freya, heading towards the moon, we believed we could enjoy this rare and relaxing journey to the fullest — or so we thought. Mysterious shadows, sudden weightlessness, disappearing items, glaringly faulty alibi... Is the culprit among us? (Source: Official Twitter account)
